_meta.doc: Run-loop config. ENDLESS descent: there is NO fixed floor count — you go as deep as you can, difficulty (tier + enemy level) climbing with depth, an Alpha boss every `bossEvery` floors. A run ends ONLY on death, Collection (Surveillance maxed, tethered), or a VOLUNTARY extract after a boss (bank your gains). `maxDepth` is the legacy fixed-length used only when `endless` is false. With runtimeGen ON, GameMapGen grows a FRESH floor per descent from run.seed+floor+actIdx (a shared seed reproduces the descent); the act composer composes one paced act (length=bossEvery) per boss-cadence chunk. floorPool/bossPool are the pre-baked fallback used when runtimeGen is off.

scaling._doc: Endless difficulty ramp (DATA-driven, shared by main.js _genFloor and tools/sim_run.mjs so the sim predicts the real curve). depthBonus = round((floor-1)*enemyLevelPerFloor) is added to every enemy/boss level; earlyGrace floors get -graceLevels so the opening is gentle; bossLevelBonus tunes Alpha lethality.
